scope.excluded_scope: Stage 1 through Stage 8 command skills and stage-associated subskills

rule_engine.selection_strategy: Match task intent against task_triggers first, then capabilities and domains. Use input_requirements and outputs to confirm fit. Prefer high-priority skills when multiple skills match the same implementation or validation task.
compatibility_notes: Every included skill is represented as a rule-addressable object.
Inferred metadata is marked per skill.
Stage-associated skills are excluded from active agent-task-builder routing in this registry.
The registry preserves source paths so agents can load full skill instructions when selected.

skills.name: document-to-skill-package
skills.description: Converts a structured markdown source document and mapping file into an OpenCode-compatible skill package with a SKILL.md and deterministic reference files.
capabilities: split top-level sections into reference files
stop when mappings are missing or ambiguous
constraints: requires source document and mapping file
must preserve deterministic section order
must stop on mapping mismatch

skills.name: git-worktree-orchestrator
skills.description: Creates isolated git worktrees for feature development with safety checks, environment setup, dependency installation, and baseline validation.
constraints: must verify safety before writing
must stop if baseline tests fail
must preserve repository cleanliness

skills.name: backend-development
skills.description: Provides backend engineering guidance for API contracts, service architecture, authentication, authorization, security, performance, stack selection, testing, deployment, observability, debugging, and maintainability.
input_requirements: security and deployment constraints when applicable
constraints: load only references relevant to task context
prefer established backend patterns over ad hoc designs
include security and testing considerations for production work

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: Guides feature and bugfix work through strict test-driven development: write a failing test first, verify failure, implement minimally, verify passing tests, then refactor.
constraints: must not write production code before a failing test
must verify the test fails for the expected reason
must keep implementation minimal until tests pass

skills.name: mapping-user-flow-progression
skills.description: Maps detailed user experience progression, page transitions, trigger-level interaction flows, state changes, navigation logic, and backend hooks before implementation.
input_requirements: interaction questions when behavior is unclear
constraints: must ask one clarifying question at a time
must not generate page files until core flow is defined
must define every trigger with action, state change, navigation, and backend hook

skills.name: researching-tech-stack-best-practices
skills.description: Reads a technology stack decision plan, extracts explicitly listed technologies, researches best practices per technology, and generates modular best-practice documentation plus a cross-stack overview.
capabilities: research best practices independently per technology
input_requirements: MCP research availability when external best practices are required
tools_or_scripts: MCP research tool such as Context7
constraints: must not guess technologies
must not infer technologies not explicitly listed
must not merge multiple technologies into one file
must report missing stack file as blocker

skills.name: creating-dynamic-wireframes
skills.description: Interprets product documentation or UX flow files and generates deterministic low-fidelity wireframes with page architecture, states, triggers, and annotated ASCII layouts.
input_requirements: product documentation or default UX overview
auth and role assumptions when relevant
constraints: must not guess page count
must not skip state definitions
must not overwrite existing wireframes unless explicitly instructed
must ask clarification for missing critical UX data

skills.name: swift-expert
skills.description: Builds Swift applications across Apple platforms, implements SwiftUI views, protocol-oriented architectures, async/await concurrency, actors, Combine, UIKit integration, Vapor, and Swift-specific debugging.
constraints: must use async/await for asynchronous operations
must ensure Sendable compliance for concurrency
must avoid unjustified force unwraps
must avoid retain cycles
must run Swift validation commands when applicable

skills.name: debugging-wizard
skills.description: Parses errors, traces stack traces and logs, correlates failures, and applies hypothesis-driven debugging to isolate and resolve bugs.
input_requirements: stack trace or logs when available
constraints: must reproduce before fixing
must test one hypothesis at a time
must not guess without evidence
must add regression safeguards after fixing

skills.name: worktree-merge-manager
skills.description: Safely merges or discards git worktrees after explicit human confirmation, with clean-state checks, change summaries, conflict handling, and cleanup.
capabilities: request explicit merge or discard confirmation
constraints: must never execute merge or delete without confirmation
must stop on dirty worktree
must stop on merge conflict
must reject invalid confirmation

skills.name: dynamic-wireframe-mapper
skills.description: Analyzes PRDs, UI/UX drafts, or user flows and generates dynamic component dependency wireframe graphs showing components, triggers, states, data flow, and UI-to-backend interactions.
capabilities: extract features, actions, components, states, and transitions
identify inferred relationships and missing clarity
constraints: must ingest source document first
must not invent unsupported components
must only include relationships supported by the document
must save output to docs wireframes path

skills.name: systematic-debugger
skills.description: Enforces a root-cause-first debugging process for bugs, test failures, build failures, integration problems, performance issues, and unexpected behavior before proposing fixes.
capabilities: read errors and stack traces completely
trace data flow to the source
compare broken code to working patterns
question architecture after repeated failed fixes
constraints: must not propose fixes before root cause investigation
must complete each debugging phase in order
must stop after three failed fixes and question architecture
must use test-driven-development for failing test creation when applicable

skills.name: ux-enforcement
skills.description: Validates implemented interfaces against planned UX flows, interactions, and states to detect missing steps, unclear actions, usability regressions, and broken goal completion paths.
capabilities: validate loading success error and empty states
constraints: must not visually redesign UI
must not introduce new features unless required to fix UX
must stay aligned with original UX intent
must prioritize correctness over creativity

skills.name: frontend-design
skills.description: Designs and implements distinctive production-grade frontend interfaces with clear aesthetic direction, token systems, responsive behavior, motion, accessibility, and stack-specific implementation.
input_requirements: known product surface or UI task
accessibility and performance constraints when applicable
constraints: must route to minimum relevant references
must define clear design intent
must avoid generic AI-like composition
must use semantic accessible responsive implementation
must match design approach to surface type

skills.name: security-review
skills.description: Dynamically reviews and hardens code security by scanning changed security surfaces, detecting project context, selecting relevant checks, ranking findings, patching safe issues when permitted, and reporting verification and residual risk.
capabilities: detect project stack and security surfaces
constraints: must review changed security-relevant files first
must expand scope only when security boundaries require it
must adapt checks to detected stack and surfaces
must respect edit and bash permissions
must never allow hardcoded secrets
must validate user input at trust boundaries
must avoid leaking sensitive error details
must check authorization before sensitive operations
must document verification and residual risk

skills.name: commit-summary
skills.description: Creates a concise commit title and brief 20-30 word description summarizing codebase changes from git diff, git status, changed files, or user-provided change notes.
capabilities: separate core changes from incidental churn
input_requirements: user-provided change notes or repository diff
git diff or diff stat when available
constraints: must not invent changes
must keep title concise
must keep description between 20 and 30 words
must return only title and description unless clarification is needed

skills.name: skill-registry-builder
skills.description: Scans non-stage skills in .opencode/Skills, extracts structured metadata, infers missing capability data, and generates a standardized JSON registry optimized for agent-task-builder and rule-engine compatibility.
constraints: must process every non-stage skill
must exclude Stage 1 through Stage 8 skills
must output valid JSON
must preserve source paths
